subject: Cannot log into account after password reset
message: I reset my password this morning but now it keeps saying invalid credentials when I try to log in.

subject: Export to PDF not working
message: When I click export on a quote, nothing happens. No file downloads and no error message.

subject: CRM sync delay
message: Our Salesforce integration is not updating new quotes. It’s been over 2 hours.

subject: User cannot access reports
message: One of our team members is getting access denied when trying to open reports.

subject: Dashboard not loading properly
message: The dashboard widgets are stuck loading and never show any data.

subject: Reports timing out
message: Every time we try to generate a large report, it times out after a few seconds.

subject: Password reset email not received
message: I requested a password reset but never got the email.

subject: Multiple users cannot export quotes
message: Several users are reporting export failures across different browsers.

subject: CRM sync duplicates records
message: Our CRM is creating duplicate entries every time a quote is updated.

subject: UI looks broken on Chrome
message: The layout looks completely off and buttons overlap each other.
